====Pokémon==== =====On hand===== {{TrainerPoké |trainer=Milo |pkmn=Eldegoss |type1=Grass |img=830Eldegoss.png |epnum=TW04 |epname=Early-Evening Waves |desc=During the narration of his [[Galar League|Champions Cup]] {{pkmn|battle}} against [[Nessa]], it was revealed that Milo had used his {{p|Eldegoss}} against Nessa's Drednaw. Eldegoss was able to use [[Dynamax]]. None of Eldegoss's moves are known.{{tt|*|Eldegoss is implied to know a damaging Grass-type move due to the use of Max Overgrowth}}
